prompt: A vibrant summer lifestyle photoshoot of a stylish young woman holding a slim beverage can labeled “LIMELIFT – Sparkling Citrus Fizz Lemon Lime.” She wears a light green blazer, white crop top, and denim jeans, accessorized with green sunglasses and matching earrings. Her hair is in a messy bun. She smiles while looking sideways, standing against a turquoise wall with tropical palm leaf shadows cast across it. Bright natural sunlight, sharp shadows, fresh citrus color palette, ultra-realistic, high detail, commercial advertising style, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field.
